title: 16.8 Cal Arc Dipped Gloves
shortDescription: Excellent grip in wet, oily & dry environments. High dexterity resistance. High resistance to snatch, tear, cut, abrasion & heat
description: Excellent grip in wet, oily & dry environments. High dexterity resistance. High resistance to snatch, tear, cut, abrasion & heat

features: Excellent grip in wet, oily & dry environments
High resistance to snatch, tear, cut, abrasion & heat

attributes.composition: 13g Aramid flexible knit fabric; Nitrile micro foam & neoprene coating
standards: 42.3 cal/cm² Arc rated palm & 16.8 cal/cm² arc rated back
